response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development but lacks the required C++ development experience on Windows platform, which is a mandatory skill for this role. While there is some C/C++ experience, it is not recent or deep enough to meet the job's requirements. Additionally, there is no evidence of domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with multiple languages and frameworks
Proven ability to work in agile environments and contribute to high-performance systems
Excellent communication skills and experience with open-source projects
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income
Recent experience primarily in web/mobile development rather than financial systems

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
